info.name: ERP School API Collection
info.description: Complete Postman collection for ERP School Backend with 748+ APIs organized panel-wise. Includes: Super Admin, School Admin, Branch Admin, Staff Panel, Teacher Panel, Fee Panel, Warden Panel, Library Panel, Transport Panel, Parent/Student Panel, and Reports APIs.

item.name: 1. Super Admin Panel
item.description: Super Admin authentication and management APIs

item.name: 2. Client/School Admin Panel
item.description: Client management and school administration APIs

item.name: 4. Staff Panel
item.description: Staff panel APIs for admission, students, exams, and more

item.name: GET /staff-panel/exam-schedule/:id - Get Exam Schedule by ID
GET /staff-panel/fee-collection/:id - Get Fee Collection by ID
GET /staff-panel/id-card/:id - Get ID Card by ID
5. Teacher Panel
item.description: Teacher panel APIs for timetable, assignments, attendance, and more

item.name: GET /teacher-panel/diary/:id - Get Diary Entry by ID
GET /teacher-panel/live-class/:id - Get Live Class by ID
GET /teacher-panel/video-class/:id - Get Video Class by ID
6. Fee Panel
item.description: Fee management, structure, reports, and extras APIs

item.name: GET /fee-panel/fee-structure/:id - Get Fee Structure by ID
GET /fee-panel/fee-structure/class/:classId - Get Fee Structure by Class
